stemHtml: Per Annex 6, what is the requirement for the flight crew compartment door in the event of a security incident in the cabin regarding cabin crew access?

options.a: The cabin crew must be able to alert the flight crew discreetly.
options.b: The cabin crew should use a megaphone to notify the flight crew.
options.c: The cabin crew should open the door from outside.
options.d: The cabin crew should call out loudly at the compartment door.
